title: Walk-forward: Transformer is not consistently positive across windows
method: Walk-forward with 4 windows: 2005-2010, 2010-2015, 2015-2020, 2020-2025. Train on period before, test on period after. Honest result: Transformer is not consistently positive across all windows.
headline: Walk-forward honesty: the Transformer is NOT consistently positive across all 4 walk-forward windows. Mean Spearman is positive (0.05-0.18) but individual windows can be negative. This is a more honest result than the single H1+H2 split, which showed the Transformer as 5/5 positive. The walk-forward result suggests the Transformer's performance is window-dependent, and the headline 5/5 H1+H2 result is partly an artifact of the specific 2025+ and 2010-2014 windows chosen.
